d40ae76f-42d5-4e3d-80fc-7dbe0b360dd3.label: Twenty Twenty Five Encuentro de Cantaoras

label: Twenty Twenty Five Encuentro de Cantaoras

children.text: Los Encuentros de Cantaoras started in 2018 by Maribella Burgos explicitly centers female singers in bomba and provides them with a platform to showcase new compositions. Many of the songs performed at this festival, including those from the performance ensemble Ausuba (who currently has one recording on Spotify: "Yo naci mujer"), include feminist, intersectional, and racially conscious, or activist lyrics.
